title: Lead Instructional Designer at iDiscoveri Education

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at iDiscoveri Education
jsonLd.description:
iDiscoveri Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iDiscoveri Education:
iDiscoveri Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education!
